title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at LG Soft India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at LG Soft India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India Holdings Services:
LG Soft India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India Holdings Services!
